title: We Outgrow Love Like Other Things
content:
We outgrow love like other things
    And put it in the drawer,
    Till it an antique fashion shows
    Like costumes grandsires wore.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "We Outgrow Love Like Other Things"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
